candidate_llm_application: LLM hidden-state color grading: classify activation patches on a tone/saturation/hue scale; activation inclusions create topological defects in information path.

results.title: Interpretability Probing / Mechanistic Features: Survey
results.snippet: This 2025-2026 paper presents work on interpretability probing / mechanistic features, covering LLM-side mechanisms that achieve similar functional outcomes via alternative terminology.
results.judge_justification: Both candidate and result operate on the same LLM artefact (interpretability probing / mechanistic features); functional outcome matches even though vocabulary differs (gemstone-color-grading terms vs LLM terms).
